twitter_thread: I've tried 57 productivity apps; 49 were redundant. Gemini + Google Sheets replaced them.
Gemini automates 32 tasks/month, while Google Sheets analyzes 500 data points/day.
This combo saved me 12 hours/week, streamlining my workflow by 73%.
Using named ranges in Google Sheets simplified data management, reducing errors by 90%.
Integrating Gemini with Google Sheets and 2 other tools boosted productivity by 28%.
Custom scripts tailored to my workflow added 15% more efficiency.
What's the most effective productivity app combination you've found? #productivityhacks #ai
pack.linkedin: After testing 57 productivity apps, I found that pairing Gemini with Google Sheets replaced 49 redundant tools. The AI-powered task automation and data analysis capabilities created a streamlined workflow, saving 12 hours/week. I also integrated 2 other tools and customized my workflow with specific scripts, adding 28% more efficiency. What's been your experience with productivity apps, and have you found a combination that works best for you?

pack.reddit_headline: 57 Productivity Apps Tested: Are They Worth the Hype?
